/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -march=x86-64 -mtune=generic -O2 -pipe -fno-plt -fexceptions         -Wp,-D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=3 -Wformat -Werror=format-security         -fstack-clash-protection -fcf-protection         -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mno-omit-leaf-frame-pointer -Wp,-D_GLIBCXX_ASSERTIONS -g -ffile-prefix-map=/run/media/robin/robinScard/codingStuff/arch-unity7/pkgbuilds/dev-libs/libcolumbus/src=/usr/src/debug/libcolumbus -flto=auto -Wall -pedantic -Wextra -fvisibility=hidden -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -std=c++11 -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now          -Wl,-z,pack-relative-relocs -flto=auto  -Wl,--version-script,/run/media/robin/robinScard/codingStuff/arch-unity7/pkgbuilds/dev-libs/libcolumbus/src/libcolumbus-1.1.0+15.10.20150806/src/libcolumbus.map -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/columbus.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libcolumbus.so.1 -o libcolumbus.so.1.1.0 CMakeFiles/columbus.dir/LevenshteinIndex.cc.o CMakeFiles/columbus.dir/IndexMatches.cc.o CMakeFiles/columbus.dir/ErrorValues.cc.o CMakeFiles/columbus.dir/Word.cc.o CMakeFiles/columbus.dir/ColumbusHelpers.cc.o CMakeFiles/columbus.dir/ColumbusSlow.cc.o CMakeFiles/columbus.dir/WordList.cc.o CMakeFiles/columbus.dir/Document.cc.o CMakeFiles/columbus.dir/Corpus.cc.o CMakeFiles/columbus.dir/Matcher.cc.o CMakeFiles/columbus.dir/MatchResults.cc.o CMakeFiles/columbus.dir/IndexWeights.cc.o CMakeFiles/columbus.dir/MatcherStatistics.cc.o CMakeFiles/columbus.dir/WordStore.cc.o CMakeFiles/columbus.dir/ColumbusCAPI.cc.o CMakeFiles/columbus.dir/ErrorMatrix.cc.o CMakeFiles/columbus.dir/ResultFilter.cc.o CMakeFiles/columbus.dir/Trie.cc.o CMakeFiles/columbus.dir/SearchParameters.cc.o  -licuuc
